title: ourisia fragrans
intro: Ourisia fragrans is a flowering plant species native to New Zealand, known for its fragrant flowers and attractive foliage. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The plant is also believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system. Ourisia fragrans can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
